zh.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines是Morgan De Meschines的兒子，出生。他和Cecelia De Fulford至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines是Morgan De Meschines的儿子，出生。他和Cecelia De Fulford至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines was born as the son of Morgan De Meschines. He had at least 1 son with Cecelia De Fulford.

fr.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines est né, fils de Morgan De Meschines. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Cecelia De Fulford.

de.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines wurde, als Sohn von Morgan De Meschines geboren. Er hatte mit Cecelia De Fulford mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines è nato il come figlio di Morgan De Meschines. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Cecelia De Fulford.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph De MeschinesはMorgan De Meschinesの息子として生まれた。彼はCecelia De Fulfordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines(은)는 Morgan De Meschines의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Cecelia De Fulford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines nasceu filho de Morgan De Meschines. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Cecelia De Fulford.

ru.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines родился. Его отца звали Morgan De Meschines. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Cecelia De Fulford.

es.lifeSummary: Ranulph De Meschines nació como hijo de Morgan De Meschines. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Cecelia De Fulford.
